summary: Neutrophils play significant but not necessarily predominant roles; instead, microbial components dominate due to their high numbers and involvement in initiating inflammation and infection control mechanisms in plaque development. The answer selected based on this rationale is \(\boxed{\text{microbial}}\) content. This highlights both qualitative contributions from other elements yet underscores quantitative predominance attributed primarily to microbes. Thus,\(\boxed{\text{microbes}}.\)
